ops.text:
E30.5 VERIFY = CONFIRMED (independent recompute, own AUC/stats code, zero harness imports; matched all 5 AUCs + σ_train + CI + floors to ~1e-9). σ_train=0.008067, floors m1=0.03612 / m5=0.02208, historical σ=0.010 in CI. Config identical-except-seed at the KNOB level (differing fields — examples_digest, realized steps 634-642, n_examples — are all deterministic downstream of the seed, not independent knobs). Data pinned (sha 3c2dc3f4). SPEND BUG CONFIRMED: actual Tinker $45.03 ≤ $56 cap; results.json total_spend_usd=135.28 is the buggy sum of cumulative counters (papercut-worthy in the E30.5 harness report). Sanity exact + pre-training. E30.5 CLOSED.

CAMPAIGN REDIRECT (σ_train-informed): σ_train's 0.036 floor swamps SMALL WATCHER-RECIPE tweaks (→ DEFER E39 NS-DPO recency, a <0.02 effect) but is IRRELEVANT to distinct-task / distinct-architecture experiments, which are exactly the user's directive ("small specific models for categorizing the kind of steer", "different architectures", "trained on trajectories", "mixing frontier and FT"). Reprioritized remaining work: RUN the architecture/task-diversity experiments (E36 gate encoder bake-off; E43 NEW steer-type classifier — the user's "small specific model for the kind of steer", on the frozen 11-way steer-type frame n=250 via encoder.py; E37 MoE ceiling; E40 trajectory imminence; E41 distilled resident judge; E38 conformal frontier+FT hybrid), each with its OWN variance characterization (σ_train is watcher-specific). DEFER the noise-limited watcher-recipe tweaks (E39; E42 decision-DPO pending E30.2a giving it a real instrument). The instrument card v2 (E30.6) will encode σ_train's promotion-gate implication + per-task floors after E30.2a/2b. Dispatching the encoder push (E36 + E43) now — GPU freed by E30.5.
